author: SHADOW6six
install_msg:
MTGC installed successfully!
Use `[p]mtgc` to start creating custom MTG cards.
Use `[p]help mtgc` to see all available commands.

Requires: pillow (`[p]pipinstall pillow`)
name: MTGC
short: Create custom Magic: The Gathering cards with uploaded art.
description: A polished MTG card creator with 13 frame styles, interactive modal workflow, and automatic border generation. Upload any image as card art and receive a 488x680 JPEG card.
end_user_data_statement: This cog stores no persistent user data. Card creation parameters are held in memory only for the duration of the interactive session and cleared immediately after card generation or session timeout.
